block_00: How to know if you need to switch up your approach?
block_01: Many traders have been in this situation at least once: you are doing your best to learn a new strategy, you spend a lot of time and effort on mastering it, but it just doesn’t work. This leads to frustration and emotional trading. Why do some strategies work for you and others — don’t?
block_02: In this week’s material, we have collected 5 reasons that can indicate that it is time to improve the strategy you are using, or completely ditch it and try something new. Check the full article to find out about the signs that may predict a bad trading strategy.
